body: Hey Amara, following up on our conversation from last week about the [Halfway Capital](orgs/halfway-capital) deal flow you mentioned in the energy storage space. I've been digging into a few of the names you flagged and one in particular — the grid-edge optimization play out of Austin — caught my attention from a co-investment angle. Benchmark has been building out our climate infrastructure thesis quietly over the past couple of quarters, and I think there's a real overlap with what you're seeing at the seed level that could make for a interesting syndicate conversation. Would you be open to a quick call this week to compare notes? I'm flexible Thursday or Friday afternoon if either works for you.
